return(function(b,c,E,k,l,D,y,r,t,P,U,S,O,v,g,a,i,F,o,d,M)F,d,i,O,M,a,S,P,v,U,t,g,r,o=function(b)P[b]=P[b]-(-653211-(-653212))if 675835+-675835==P[b]then P[b],i[b]=nil,nil end end,function(b,C)local
